subject: Re: dautoalign4warp
body:
Hi Alister,

Yes, correctly! I am not sure what made me do it like this in the first 
place... 
But using 'some/filelocation/' is used within all cases of any Dynamo 
walkthrough so it should have been obvious.
When debugging it looked like "some/filelocation/" will be passed as a char 
and not transformed to a string at any point thus, creating the error. 
Anyways! 
Thank you for your fast responses and all the best,

Felix 

alist...@gmail.com schrieb am Mittwoch, 7. Juni 2023 um 15:08:02 UTC+2:

> Hey Felix,
>
> You mean that 
>
> dautoalign4warp("/scripts/dynamo/imod/", 1.984, 2, 95.4, 
> "/scripts/dynamo/dRecon”)
>
>
> Doesn’t work
>
> And
>
> dautoalign4warp('/scripts/dynamo/imod', 1.984, 2, 95.4, 
> '/scripts/dynamo/dRecon')
>
>
> Does?
>
> 🤦🏼‍♂️
>
> Glad it’s sorted anyway - I’ll update the README
>
>
> On 7 Jun 2023, at 13:25, Felix Lange <felix.l...@gmail.com> wrote:
>
> Hi Alister,
>
> you indicated that it might be a simple issue. It was indeed. For all 
> people running into this issue, I used " " to indicate the file locations 
> while ' ' would be necessary. Now with this change everything is working.
> Cheers,
>
> Felix
>
> alist...@gmail.com schrieb am Mittwoch, 7. Juni 2023 um 11:38:23 UTC+2:
>
>> You’ll have to step through and see what’s going on then if there aren’t 
>> any explicit errors 
>>
>> Cheers,
>>
>> Alister
>>
>> Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
>>
>> On 7 Jun 2023, at 10:36, Felix Lange <felix.l...@gmail.com> wrote:
>>
>> ﻿It does work to the point that it will try to create the workflow for 
>> all TS but it doesn't produce an actual alignment. Strange
>>
>>
>>
>> alist...@gmail.com schrieb am Mittwoch, 7. Juni 2023 um 11:25:08 UTC+2:
>>

>>> alist...@gmail.com schrieb am Mittwoch, 7. Juni 2023 um 10:58:07 UTC+2:
>>>
>>>> Hey Felix,
>>>>
>>>> Can you post the full trace back? Probably some matlab update has 
>>>> changed how you’re supposed to do something simple 
>>>>
>>>> Cheers,
>>>>
>>>> Alister
>>>>
>>>> Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
>>>>
>>>> On 7 Jun 2023, at 09:49, Felix Lange <felix.l...@gmail.com> wrote:
>>>>
>>>> ﻿Dear all,
>>>>
>>>>
>>>> I wanted to test the dautoalign4warp script to align tilt series 
>>>> processed in warp in dynamo. Right at the first TS I receive the following 
>>>> error:
>>>>
>>>> Warning: All string and cell array inputs must be the same size or 
>>>> scalars.
>>>>
>>>> My input looks like this:
>>>>
>>>> dautoalign4warp("scripts/dynamo/imod/", 1.984, 2, 95.4, 
>>>> "scripts/dynamo/dRecon")
>>>> for the requested format of the function 
>>>> "dautoalign4warp(warp_imod_dir, apix, fiducial_diameter_nm, 
>>>> nominal_rotation_angle, output_folder)"
>>>>
>>>> Does anyone knows how to solve this issue? Thank you and all the best,
>>>>
>>>> Felix 
>>>>
